case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. ITAI WANG

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 66415704) TO PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-10-2022 CONTINUED TO AUG-09-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WANG, ITAI $2,902.09 PRINCIPAL, $292.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,194.09, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100166285)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66415704) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, ITAI NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-07-2021
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 66415704) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT (1033) (TRANSACTION ID # 100166285) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $292.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100166285) AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, ITAI
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200028150), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. SERVED APR-03-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, ITAI
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 100132763) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, ITAI
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-10-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-09-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
